BombVault's biggest update yet: a full UX redesign. The goal was to make it simpler by default and easier to find your way around, without hiding any of the power.

## A simpler, tidier interface

- **Visible Simple / Advanced switch.** The mode control moved from a hidden checkbox to a clear switch in the sidebar (it flips like the light/dark toggle). Simple mode shows only the essentials; Advanced reveals retention, off-site copy, pre/post hooks, file-level restore, notifications, metrics and the rest. It's a per-browser preference, off by default.
- **Settings, now in tabs.** The one long Settings page is split into **General · Paths & Storage · Schedules · Off-site · Notifications · Integrity · System**.
- **Every schedule in one place.** The new **Schedules** tab is the single home for backup, off-site replication, self-backup, restore-check and tamper-test cadences. The separate Plans page is retired; `/jobs` now opens Settings → Schedules. The included-in-schedule container view is preserved.
- **A calmer dashboard.** A two-tier layout puts a compact summary row (overall health, next backup, last result) above the details, shows at most one banner at a time, and tucks the expert stat tiles behind Advanced. The run history now shows each run's full date and time (with the relative age underneath) and holds more entries at a glance. (#45)
- **Filters in a popover.** The Containers and VMs toolbars collapse their search and filters into a single **Filters** button, with an indicator when a filter is active so a saved filter never silently hides rows.
- **Off-site protection, grouped.** The off-site repo, retention, bandwidth, rclone and cloud settings sit under one clearly-named section.
- **Make the dashboard yours.** Hit **Customize** on the dashboard to drag the cards into the order you want (or nudge them up/down) and hide the ones you don't need. Your layout is saved in this browser. (#46)

## Clearer wording

- BombVault's own `/config` backup is now called **Self-Backup**.
- The two different "keep history" controls have distinct labels (keep exported zip files vs. snapshot retention).
- Relative times are written out ("3 days ago" instead of "3d"), in every language.

## Under the hood

- The restore UI (progress, cancel, in-place action) is now shared across Containers, VMs and Recovery instead of copy-pasted per page.
- Everything above is translated across all 24 languages.

## Also included (from v4.9.1 / v4.9.2)

- A "not installed" container that still has backups now shows its real last-backup date instead of "Last backup: Never". (#44)
- The Recovery tab's readability check is read-only: checking whether your backups are readable no longer resurfaces a deleted-container entry. Only the explicit **Discover backups** action rebuilds the list. (#44)

## One more thing

Press and hold the sidebar logo. 💣

---
